Id1.text: Buzz Aldrin, who was a member of the Apollo 11 crew and spent 52 minutes in space, was born in Glen Ridge New Jersey.

Id2.text: Born in Glen Ridge New Jersey, Apollo 11 crewman Buzz Aldrin spent 52 minutes in space.

Id3.text: Born in Glen Ridge, NJ, Buzz Aldrin spent 52 minutes in space as part of Apollo 11's crew.
